column.name: regulatory_footer
column.value: Regulatory Status - Category 2 Credit Provider regulated by the Financial Services Regulatory Authority (FSRA) of the Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) under License No. 14218.

column.name: template_json
column.value: {"title":"Key Fact Statement","headerLines":["Date of Issue: ${dateOfIssue}","Issued by: ${issuedBy}","Issued to: ${borrowerName}","Loan ID: ${externalId}"],"sections":[{"key":"facility","title":"1. Facility Overview & Core Terms","columns":["Sr. No.","Parameter / Feature","Currency","Details"],"rows":[{"sn":"(i)","label":"Approved Limit / Loan Amount","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${approvedAmount}"},{"sn":"(ii)","label":"Product Type","currency":"-","value":"Revenue-Based Financing"},{"sn":"(iii)","label":"Tenure","currency":"-","value":"${tenure}"},{"sn":"(iv)","label":"Repayment Frequency","currency":"-","value":"${repaymentFrequency}"},{"sn":"(v)","label":"Total Interest","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${totalInterest}"},{"sn":"(vi)","label":"${interestRateBasisLabel}","currency":"-","value":"${interestRateBasisValue}"},{"sn":"(vii)","label":"Total Repayable Amount","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${totalRepayable} (Principal + Interest)"},{"sn":"(viii)","label":"Processing Fee exclusive VAT","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${processingFee}"},{"sn":"(ix)","label":"VAT on Processing Fee","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${vatOnProcessingFee}"},{"sn":"(x)","label":"Prepayment / Early Closure Fee","currency":"%","value":"${prepaymentFeeDesc}"},{"sn":"(xi)","label":"Other Fees and Charges","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${otherFees}"},{"sn":"(xii)","label":"Late Payment / Overdue Interest","currency":"%","value":"${latePaymentRateDesc}"}]},{"key":"disbursement","title":"2. Disbursement Details","columns":["Parameter","Details"],"rows":[{"label":"Loan ID","value":"${externalId}"},{"label":"Approved Amount","value":"${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"},{"label":"Disbursement Date","value":"${disbursementDate}"},{"label":"Disbursed Amount","value":"${currencyCode} ${disbursedAmount}"}]},{"key":"schedule","title":"3. Detailed Repayment & Amortization Schedule","columns":["#","Outstanding Principal (${currencyCode})","EMI Due Date","EMI Amount (${currencyCode})","Principal Due (${currencyCode})","Interest (${currencyCode})","Status"],"source":"repaymentSchedule"}]}

column.name: regulatory_footer
column.value: Regulatory Status - Category 2 Credit Provider regulated by the Financial Services Regulatory Authority (FSRA) of the Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) under License No. 14218.

column.name: template_json
column.value: {"title":"Key Fact Statement","headerLines":["Date of Issue: ${dateOfIssue}","Issued by: ${issuedBy}","Issued to: ${borrowerName}","Loan ID: ${externalId}"],"sections":[{"key":"facility","title":"1. Facility Overview & Core Terms","columns":["Sr. No.","Parameter / Feature","Currency","Details"],"rows":[{"sn":"(i)","label":"Approved Limit / Loan Amount","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${approvedAmount}"},{"sn":"(ii)","label":"Product Type","currency":"-","value":"Invoice Discounting"},{"sn":"(iii)","label":"Tenure","currency":"-","value":"${tenure}"},{"sn":"(iv)","label":"Repayment Frequency","currency":"-","value":"${repaymentFrequency}"},{"sn":"(v)","label":"Total Interest","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${totalInterest}"},{"sn":"(vi)","label":"Interest Rate","currency":"%","value":"${interestRate} per annum"},{"sn":"(vii)","label":"Total Repayable Amount","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${totalRepayable} (Principal + Interest)"},{"sn":"(viii)","label":"Processing Fee exclusive VAT","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${processingFee}"},{"sn":"(ix)","label":"VAT on Processing Fee","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${vatOnProcessingFee}"},{"sn":"(x)","label":"Prepayment / Early Closure Fee","currency":"%","value":"${prepaymentFeeDesc}"},{"sn":"(xi)","label":"Other Fees and Charges","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${otherFees}"},{"sn":"(xii)","label":"Late Payment / Overdue Interest","currency":"%","value":"${latePaymentRateDesc}"}]},{"key":"disbursement","title":"2. Disbursement Details","columns":["Parameter","Details"],"rows":[{"label":"Loan ID","value":"${externalId}"},{"label":"Approved Amount","value":"${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"},{"label":"Disbursement Date","value":"${disbursementDate}"},{"label":"Disbursed Amount","value":"${currencyCode} ${disbursedAmount}"}]},{"key":"schedule","title":"3. Detailed Repayment & Amortization Schedule","columns":["#","Outstanding Principal (${currencyCode})","EMI Due Date","EMI Amount (${currencyCode})","Principal Due (${currencyCode})","Interest (${currencyCode})","Status"],"source":"repaymentSchedule"}]}

column.name: regulatory_footer
column.value: Regulatory Status - Category 2 Credit Provider regulated by the Financial Services Regulatory Authority (FSRA) of the Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) under License No. 14218.

column.name: template_json
column.value: {"title":"Key Fact Statement","headerLines":["Date of Issue: ${dateOfIssue}","Issued by: ${issuedBy}","Issued to: ${borrowerName}","Loan ID: ${externalId}"],"sections":[{"key":"facility","title":"1. Facility Overview & Core Terms","columns":["Sr. No.","Parameter / Feature","Currency","Details"],"rows":[{"sn":"(i)","label":"Approved Limit / Loan Amount","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${approvedAmount}"},{"sn":"(ii)","label":"Product Type","currency":"-","value":"Payables Finance"},{"sn":"(iii)","label":"Tenure","currency":"-","value":"${tenure}"},{"sn":"(iv)","label":"Repayment Frequency","currency":"-","value":"${repaymentFrequency}"},{"sn":"(v)","label":"Total Interest","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${totalInterest}"},{"sn":"(vi)","label":"Interest Rate","currency":"%","value":"${interestRate} per annum"},{"sn":"(vii)","label":"Total Repayable Amount","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${totalRepayable} (Principal + Interest)"},{"sn":"(viii)","label":"Processing Fee exclusive VAT","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${processingFee}"},{"sn":"(ix)","label":"VAT on Processing Fee","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${vatOnProcessingFee}"},{"sn":"(x)","label":"Prepayment / Early Closure Fee","currency":"%","value":"${prepaymentFeeDesc}"},{"sn":"(xi)","label":"Other Fees and Charges","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${otherFees}"},{"sn":"(xii)","label":"Late Payment / Overdue Interest","currency":"%","value":"${latePaymentRateDesc}"}]},{"key":"disbursement","title":"2. Disbursement Details","columns":["Parameter","Details"],"rows":[{"label":"Loan ID","value":"${externalId}"},{"label":"Approved Amount","value":"${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"},{"label":"Disbursement Date","value":"${disbursementDate}"},{"label":"Disbursed Amount","value":"${currencyCode} ${disbursedAmount}"}]},{"key":"schedule","title":"3. Detailed Repayment & Amortization Schedule","columns":["#","Outstanding Principal (${currencyCode})","EMI Due Date","EMI Amount (${currencyCode})","Principal Due (${currencyCode})","Interest (${currencyCode})","Status"],"source":"repaymentSchedule"}]}

column.name: regulatory_footer
column.value: Regulatory Status - Category 2 Credit Provider regulated by the Financial Services Regulatory Authority (FSRA) of the Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM) under License No. 14218.

column.name: template_json
column.value: {"title":"Key Fact Statement","headerLines":["Date of Issue: ${dateOfIssue}","Issued by: ${issuedBy}","Issued to: ${borrowerName}","Loan ID: ${externalId}"],"sections":[{"key":"facility","title":"1. Facility Overview & Core Terms","columns":["Sr. No.","Parameter / Feature","Currency","Details"],"rows":[{"sn":"(i)","label":"Approved Limit / Loan Amount","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${approvedAmount}"},{"sn":"(ii)","label":"Product Type","currency":"-","value":"Factor Rate"},{"sn":"(iii)","label":"Tenure","currency":"-","value":"${tenure}"},{"sn":"(iv)","label":"Repayment Frequency","currency":"-","value":"${repaymentFrequency}"},{"sn":"(v)","label":"Total Repayable","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${totalRepayable}"},{"sn":"(vi)","label":"Factor Rate","currency":"x","value":"${factorRate}"},{"sn":"(vii)","label":"Total Repayable Amount","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${totalRepayable}"},{"sn":"(viii)","label":"Processing Fee exclusive VAT","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${processingFee}"},{"sn":"(ix)","label":"VAT on Processing Fee","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${vatOnProcessingFee}"},{"sn":"(x)","label":"Prepayment / Early Closure Fee","currency":"%","value":"${prepaymentFeeDesc}"},{"sn":"(xi)","label":"Other Fees and Charges","currency":"${currencyCode}","value":"${otherFees}"},{"sn":"(xii)","label":"Late Payment / Overdue Interest","currency":"%","value":"${latePaymentRateDesc}"}]},{"key":"disbursement","title":"2. Disbursement Details","columns":["Parameter","Details"],"rows":[{"label":"Loan ID","value":"${externalId}"},{"label":"Approved Amount","value":"${currencyCode} ${approvedAmount}"},{"label":"Disbursement Date","value":"${disbursementDate}"},{"label":"Disbursed Amount","value":"${currencyCode} ${disbursedAmount}"}]},{"key":"schedule","title":"3. Detailed Repayment & Amortization Schedule","columns":["#","Outstanding Principal (${currencyCode})","Instalment Due Date","Instalment Amount (${currencyCode})","Principal Due (${currencyCode})","Interest / Fee (${currencyCode})","Status"],"source":"repaymentSchedule"}]}
